title: Support the Arts

title: Beer Is Proof
headline: Beer Is Proof earns a second look
caption:
Beer Is Proof is specific enough to stop the scroll even before the joke fully registers. A joke aimed at the misattributed 'Beer is proof that God loves us' quote often pinned on Benjamin Franklin, reframing beer as a product of science rather than divinity. It is the kind of design that rewards curiosity and a slightly strange sense of humor. https://thirdstringshirts.myspreadshop.com/beer+is+proof?idea=5d89cc1420517626420dceae Tell us if the reference lands.

title: Michael Garrett Cullen Jason
headline: Michael Garrett Cullen Jason wears the fandom plainly
caption:
Michael Garrett Cullen Jason leans into sports without pretending to be for casual observers. A reference to the 2008 USA men's 4x100 medley relay team, listing the first names of the four swimmers including Michael Phelps. title: Rising Star was dead in a week
headline: Rising Star was dead in a week is a reference worth keeping
caption:
